pattern: Preorder names the root first; locating that root inside inorder splits the remaining values into the left and right subtrees, recursively.
hints: The first value of preorder is always the current subtree's root.
Find that root inside inorder: everything left of it is the left subtree, everything right is the right subtree, and their sizes tell you how to slice preorder.
Recurse on the matching preorder/inorder slices; a hash map from value to its inorder index turns each lookup into O(1).

edge_inputs.description: balanced tree from the canonical traversals
fully left-skewed: each root has only a left child
fully right-skewed: each root has only a right child

stress.description: build a random tree, derive its preorder+inorder so they are consistent and the answer is unique
stress.note: values are distinct (sample) as the problem guarantees
